title: Eritakhe
description: New mushroom trees for your green wood needs.
body:
This mod adds a new mushroom type, the Turlicz mushroom is a mushroom that is a light blue on the outside, and a foresty green on the inside.

The large Turlicz mushrooms generate naturally in the mushroom fields biome, meaning that with this new wood, and the existing mushrooms, the mushroom fields are a place to be lived in.

With the Turlicz mushroom stems, you can craft wooden planks the same color as the inside of the log, along with the planks there are slabs, stairs, fence gates, trapdoors, doors, and buttons, all that can be used for building with a nice green wood.
